# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:alpine3.9 AS builder

RUN groupadd -r docker && useradd -r -g docker docker
USER root
COPY --from=builder /etc/passwd /etc/group /
ENV container=docker

FROM --platform=linux/amd64 python:alpine3.9

USER root

COPY . .

# Expose the host Docker socket for communication with the host's Docker daemon
VOLUME /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock

# Set the working directory in the container to the root directory
WORKDIR /

# Specify the command that should be executed when the container starts
CMD ["python", "manage_containers.py"]
